missingSurface: AppointmentRecord does not persist authoritative appointment_start_at, appointment_end_at, or appointment_time_zone fields for reminder scheduling.
temporaryFallback: Phase4BookingReminderApplication accepts explicit appointment timing in refresh commands and otherwise reconstructs timing from the current slot-search snapshot while the selected slot still matches the current booking truth.
riskIfUnresolved: If the slot snapshot drifts or is no longer available, reminder timing can no longer be reconstructed from authoritative appointment truth alone.
followUpAction: Persist authoritative appointment timing on AppointmentRecord and retire the slot-search timing fallback from reminder scheduling.
